text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's Valentine's Day. While working in my office...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The day where one gives chocolate as a token of
appreciation! I, too, followed the tradition and
prepared these for you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now, don't be shy! Hurry up and try some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going along with her request, I open up the
parcel handed to me to reveal a selection of
bite-sized chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's the matter? You won't have any?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Truthfully, the idea of consuming something
offered by her scares me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But if I refuse...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I did my best to make these.
choice_data_list: (Maybe... she actually has no ulterior motive!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Steeling my resolve, I pop some of the chocolate
into my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolate melts in my mouth with a velvety
creaminess, unveiling a delectable sweetness that
isn't overbearing in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, why of course it is. Did you think I would
mess up something as simple as making
chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But never mind that. Excuse me for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon comes over and leans in close.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recoil instinctively. Agnes Tachyon, on the other
hand, seems rather content.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Excellent, just what I wanted! This was a success!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! I got the results I wanted!
Thank you for your cooperation, guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without elaborating, Agnes Tachyon leaves the
office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shortly after...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, do you smell that? Doesn't it smell like
chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
It does! Y'think it's Valentine's chocolate? Smells
so sweet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't take long for me to realize my body has
started to smell like chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel the sweet flavor permeating the inside of
my mouth. A rich taste of chocolate... No, of...
pork... and garlic...
choice_data_list: ...Wait! Why does it taste like a pork bowl?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's something called allithiamine, which is great
for alleviating fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Long story short, I combined ingredients that
contain ample amounts of vitamin B1 and allicin,
then compressed those into what you ate earlier.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I did it out of consideration for your fatigue.
Chocolates also have the same sedative effect
that aids in reducing anxiety, but they end up
raising blood sugar levels as a side effect.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In any case, wasn't it delicious?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, good! I'm glad to hear that! I didn't perform a
taste test, you see!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she begins to speak, she takes a piece of the
pork-bowl-flavored chocolate and tosses it into
her mouth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? How intriguing. The dissimilarity between
the outer appearance and its actual substance is
quite extreme.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You think you're eating chocolate only to
experience the complex flavors of a pork bowl...
What a horrendous betrayal.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly crave for sweets. All right, you there,
make something for me right now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, hurry hurry! I want to eat the real stuff!
I want dessert now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate cake, chiffon cake, anything will do, so
long as it's sweet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At her request, I head into the kitchen to begin
baking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some time, the scent of freshly baked
chocolate cookies pervades the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! They look tasty! I applaud your effort,
guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with these lip-smacking cookies I made, I
spend a heartwarming Valentine's Day together
with Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day isn't so bad after all!
Ha-ha-ha-ha!
